description: The speaker greets the other party or exchanges pleasantries (hello, introductions, "how may I help you").
The speaker asks the other party for information or details needed to proceed.
The speaker provides specific flight information such as airline name, flight number, route or departure date/time.
The customer expresses dissatisfaction about the service or experience in general terms (not a specific named cause).
The issue is specifically a delayed, late or rescheduled flight, or its consequences (e.g. a missed meeting).
The speaker apologizes or expresses regret for an inconvenience (typically the agent).
A refund, partial refund or compensation is offered, requested or discussed.
The speaker expresses gratitude or appreciation.
The speaker wraps up the conversation (offering further help, saying goodbye, confirming nothing else is needed).
